commands.review_summary:
The PR replaces synchronous workspace bootstrap reads and `fs.glob` extra-bootstrap expansion with async/yielding paths, adds bootstrap and hook timing instrumentation, and updates focused workspace and internal hook tests.

PR surface: Source +159, Tests +428. Total +587 across 9 files.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live reproduction was run in this review. The linked issue provides production liveness logs, and current-main source confirms the implicated synchronous read, `fs.glob`, and sequential hook path inside bootstrap-context, so the bug is source-reproducible with medium confidence.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can preserve current no-match glob behavior; broader custom-walker compatibility and final merge acceptance still need maintainer review.
